title: Project Storm Chaser
description: Storm chasing on another level, you can intercept tornadoes!
body:
You can now storm chase in Minecraft!

In this modpack, there is a car known as the TIV 2 which will let you go inside a tornado

🌪️Mods✈️
ProtoManly's Weather, Automobility, Camerapture, Immersive Aircraft, Tornado Intercept (PMW), WI Zoom, Kelka backpack's, Man of Many Planes, PMW Storms Shake Screen! & a ton of FPS boosting mods.


The modpack is designed for you to go on your own storm chasing adventure!
